title: Perforated capsules
abstract: The present invention relates to gelatin capsules containing microbeads. The capsule has perforations that enhance the dissolution of the capsule.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A perforated hard capsule comprising at least one perforation having a first dimension and containing at least one particle with a dimension larger than the perforation in the capsule wherein the capsule and the at least one particle are not dissolvable in the mouth. 2. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 1 comprising a plurality of perforations. 3. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 1 wherein the first dimension of the at least one perforation is from about 0.1 mm to about 5.0 mm. 4. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 2 wherein the first dimension of the plurality of perforations is from about 0.5 mm to about 3.0 mm. 5. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 1 wherein the particles are liquid filled microbeads. 6. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 5 wherein the microbeads are made from gelatin. 7. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 5 wherein the liquid comprises a pharmaceutically active agent. 8. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 7 wherein the pharmaceutically active agent is ibuprofen. 9. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 7 wherein the pharmaceutically active agent is acetaminophen. 10. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 1 wherein the particles are compressed granules. 11. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 10 wherein the compressed granule comprises a pharmaceutically active agent. 12. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 11 wherein the pharmaceutically active agent is ibuprofen. 13. The perforated hard capsule according to claim 11 wherein the pharmaceutically active agent is acetaminophen.
